who's like a lesser player of him okay you got a hit you got to hit him okay because there everybody knows who they are and everybody knows what their message is you don't name them by name but you know as you're well aware there are still a few sales trainers in the real estate industry actually as incredible as it may seem still telling people to cold call with the same old scripts and the same old methods and you know so you got to attack them it's you know it's like you know it's like making a Clinton joke I mean you got to do it because they're everybody knows who they are and they're easy so the things got to be really connected and made relevant to their industry now if you're gonna run this in like a generic sales magazine which there is no good such thing then a generic ad you got to have it right but as soon as you go into a niche they you you know you want to do it right the last thing I would say to you is and this is this is not a copy issue but this is an aside this is a testing issue has as unpleasant as it may be in most cases the only way you know anything is by testing with good media and not bad media and so a lot of people make this mistake oh they'll give me a free ad so I'll do this well first of all there's a reason they're giving you a free right and so like in the real estate industry realtors where the game is played now the state publications will work and you know but there's the only way you're gonna know is if you were in realtor and so you got to put your best foot forward and if you want to play you got to go spend the 20 grand and you got to see what happens okay but if you do it my analogy is always we got this new young thoroughbred jockey we think he's pretty good we don't know how good he is but we think he's pretty good so we'll put him on a great big giant pig in a Kentucky Derby and see how he does and if he does good then we'll let him start riding good horses well we don't know if it was him or the pig right happens all time with drivers by the way so we get a new driver out here at the track and people say you know I think the kids got good hands I think he's pretty good and they're all putting them on their worst horses it'll take you two years to know whether there's any good or not put them on your best horse see what happens you know how the best horse is supposed to perform you know don't put them on the worst one so you sacrifice a week but you know something in a week the other way you don't know anything for a year right and so not but there's you know you could test by direct mail and get a pulse you could test by email driving to a website and get a pulse and then sort of inch your way to the big test but the one thing you never want to be doing is testing with really bad media you know like TV you'll get the Pisa you'll get the well I'm gonna run the infomercial on you know junk cable you know the community access junk cable at two o'clock in the morning and see how it does you don't know anything you know I mean you got to be careful you got to be careful about that you got two choices fundamentally yeah you're better off in the top magazine they by far well the only way you're ever going to know is the full-page ad but you can get a sense of the pulse small ad drive to site you can't be so small you're back in where all the small ads are that's a different reader it doesn't it's a microcosm of the readership doesn't tell you anything so you got to be however big you have to be to be in main news if you will and there's some media you got no choice because there's so much big you know but in many cases like he could have gone and realtor because Fort still runs only generation ad in there one of them big box ads how Susie made whatever his headline is so you know you could go there with an ad like that driving to a website and you would be indicative not predictive if you zeroed you'd have to think long and hard of whether you should play right if you got traffic but couldn't convert you'd have to be encouraged right if your cost per lead was higher than you wanted it to be you'd still probably take the next step towards testing and ultimately ever you never really know anything except doing everything it's best okay you think I got we just kind of like mapping out like like a weekly fax or daily email or a salesman or website or whatever what its purpose is supposed to be and then kind of reverse engineering from okay what is the just like he said what is the response you want to evoke and then back into what it is I mean I I hit a lot of the things but I don't hit them consistently or pre pre thought out kind of been by by accident so a lot of times I'll write something and I get done with it and not happy with it because it either veered off in a direction that I didn't intend for it to or it didn't accomplish a purpose so my biggest thing was just going back to and starting to make a list of each of the pieces like for example with the weekly fax okay well what do I want to accomplish with the weekly fax thing and there's a there's a list there and then make sure that okay you know I want to build up me so I have to make sure I stick something in there that builds me up but I also want to teach them something but I then I want to plug a member and you know just basically what you do with your map for the for the newsletter but just consciously going through that after having defined and listed out what all the different pieces are what what they're supposed to do and making the distinctions between all the 31 things you know good origin story this is origin story how it all happened at the accounting firm I busted my butt doing tax returns for the richest of the rich at st. Louis I prepared tax returns and made the yellow pages look like children's books most these people made seven figure incomes 15 years ago on top of this I was also auditing the financial statements for banking institutions other large financial companies all this gave me a unique perspective on corporate finance and the habits of the rich that would eventually lead me to a shocking financial revolution that would ultimately change my mortgage business my life forever this information was top secret when I was working at the accounting firm but since I have no obligations to them anymore I decided to see how this insider knowledge could help my mortgage business and did it help you tell me the very same year I doubled my income and made over $300,000 in fees from this one simple but vital piece of information it's good but it's a good origin story right okay Michael I need to create a persona I need to be specific about who I am of course the stories I mean that's gonna be now and everything you always I always knew that but for some reason I don't I don't know this just brought it home so stories gotta tell stories purpose writing everything with a purpose and not just sitting down and starting to write I mean have a reason for what I'm saying and what I'm trying to accomplish so those are the big things I think I got out of it.
